forcedHeirship.notes: Korean Civil Code Articles 1112-1118 govern the yuryubun (유류분) — the legally reserved portion. A spouse and lineal descendants may claim one-half of their statutory intestate share. Lineal ascendants and siblings may claim one-third. The yuryubun claim is monetary and must be exercised within one year of learning of the infringement, or within ten years of the testator's death.

estate.notes: Korean succession is governed by the Korean Civil Code (민법), Book V: Succession (Articles 1000-1118). A will (유언) may be holographic (자필증서), audio/video recorded (녹음), notarised (공정증서), sealed (비밀증서), or orally dictated (구수증서). Intestate shares follow Article 1009: a spouse receives 1.5× a child's share. The Family Court (가정법원) handles probate. Korea has no inheritance tax exemption for the primary residence — estate tax applies to worldwide assets.

properties.name: Gangnam Apartment, Teheran-ro 152
properties.notes: KRW has ISO 4217 exponent 0 — the amount field IS the face value. 1,800,000,000 KRW ≈ ₩1.8 billion (approx. USD 1.35M). Korean apartment ownership is full ownership (소유권) of the unit plus a proportional share of the common areas and land. This is distinct from jeonse tenants who hold a deposit right, not ownership.

assets.name: Shinhan Bank Savings Account
assets.notes: ₩450,000,000 held in a Shinhan Bank savings account. Korean bank accounts are frozen upon death — the Family Court must issue a certificate of inheritance (상속재산분할협의서) or court order before funds are released.

assets.name: Samsung Securities Investment Account
assets.notes: ₩300,000,000 in Korean equities and ETFs held at Samsung Securities.

assets.name: Jeonse (전세) Deposit — Mapo-gu Apartment
assets.notes: Jeonse (전세) is a uniquely Korean housing deposit system where a tenant pays a large lump-sum deposit (typically 50-80% of the property value) instead of monthly rent. The landlord returns the full deposit at the end of the lease (usually 2 years). The jeonse deposit is a receivable asset of the estate — the executor must arrange return from the landlord upon lease termination. Under the Housing Lease Protection Act (주택임대차보호법), the deposit has priority-creditor protection if the lease was registered. Categorised as 'other' with subcategory 'jeonse_deposit' because no standard asset category covers this Korean-specific concept.

bequests.description: I give my apartment at Teheran-ro 152, Gangnam-gu, Seoul to my husband Park Min-ho.
bequests.notes: Under Korean Civil Code Article 1009, the surviving spouse's intestate share is 1.5× a child's share. By specifically bequeathing the apartment, the testator ensures Min-ho receives the primary residence without the need for partition proceedings (상속재산분할).

bequests.description: I give the residue of my estate, including the jeonse deposit and all financial accounts, to my daughter Kim Ji-yeon.
